case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. BRIDGETTE PELAYO

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73431278) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PELAYO, BRIDGETTE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-17-2024

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PELAYO, BRIDGETTE $5,487.77 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $307.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,594.77, ** PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE 10 DAYS WRITTEN NOTICE TO DEFENDANT BEFORE SEEKING ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
